description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular plot with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure features a combination of black and white exterior walls, with large glass windows along one side, likely serving as the main living area. The front of the bungalow is accentuated by a small porch or entryway, and the property includes a detached, rectangular swimming pool. The surrounding yard is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The layout is open, with clear separation between the main building and the pool area, and the property is bordered by a paved surface. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a detached swimming pool, surrounded by landscaped trees and a paved yard.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, a black-and-white facade, and the detached pool in the foreground, with trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the white exterior walls, the pool to the right, and a mix of trees and shrubs around the property.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the large glass windows along the back wall, the pool to the left, and a more open yard with scattered trees.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the black sections of the building, the pool on the right, and a clear view of the landscaped yard and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on one side
